status: CONDITIONAL transfer (PROVED core lemmas) + route-scoped COUNTEREXAMPLE
hard_input: input 2 (image-scale MI+MA / direct Sidon payment) -- heavy-fiber interface of PR #716
verdict: For the unprofiled locator/power-sum prefix chart, a heavy Phi-syndrome-fiber submask of an admissible first-match residual is itself an admissible rooted profile at the original M/L normalization, PROVIDED R<char(B) (elementary chart: any char) and R<=m-2. Hence #716's hereditary hypothesis reduces to plain emission on the atlas's actual moment-curve packets. The reduction is NOT available via the power-sum chart when R>=char(B).

A_sharpened_gap_lemma.claim: b(s0)-M/|G| = sum_A (P_A b)(s0); heavy fiber pigeonholes one band; band failure lives on the whole residual b, not only the point mask f=W*1_{s0}

B_newton_fiber_coincidence_census.claim: power-sum syndrome fiber == depth-d locator-prefix fiber when d<char=p; Johnson max|S cap S'| <= a-d-1; clauses (i),(iii),(iv) hereditary

C_char_boundary_routecut.claim: when R>=char the power-sum chart fiber is NOT a locator-prefix fiber; power-sum route to admissibility is dead (obstruction: Newton diagonal 2..R hits 0)

witness.comment: p_1=e_1 always; e_2,e_3 diverge because 2|char so p_{2j}=p_j^2 collapses

C_char_boundary_routecut.manuscript_anchor: rem:binary-ambient-image (p_{2j}=p_j^2 in char 2); (A5) requires R<char for power-sum coords

D_heaviness_witness.claim: superincreasing depth-1 prefix fiber (adjacent dense-band note): exact counts, single depth-1 prefix (constant e_1), WL/M grows like (3/2)^B
D_heaviness_witness.construction: A_i=5^i, C=2*sum A_i + 1, T={A_i} U {C-A_i}, a=B, Phi=sum

interfaces.credits: avdeevvadim PR #716 (heavy-fiber interface obligation, primitive_signed_payment_barrier_v1.md / owner_rooted_dense_band_localization_v1.md sec 10)
